title: Provisioning Validation Family Skeleton
description: Skeleton only. Phase 1 Step 1 scaffold for the provisioning-validation family — provisioning-time invariants, pre-flight checks, no-native-SharePoint-admin guards, and declarative provisioning preconditions. Not fully populated. Full extraction occurs in later Phase 1 steps (Phase 1 Step 4 — Per-Family Schema Population). Traces to Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and Standard Project Site Template Contract §19, §20, §21.
